data.title: New CUDA 13.2 update boosts performance on older GPUs, offers 5x speedups with improved Top-K algorithms & Python profiling tools.
data.description: CUDA version 13.2 introduces tile-based GPU programming to older architectures, along with Python profiling tools. The update also brings up to 5 times faster performance with the implementation of new Top-K algorithms.

data.title: Share buyback programme – week 13
data.description: The Danish Financial Supervisory Authority, along with other stakeholders, are working with stock exchanges such as Nasdaq Copenhagen, Euronext Dublin, and London Stock Exchange.
BoJ: We need to pay attention to the possibility that upward pressures on prices from rising crude oil prices may have strengthened as firms have become more proactive in hiking prices and wages

data.title: Analyst warns Ethereum could drop to $1.2K, showing signs of previous 45% and 48% drops, increasing risk of breakdown.
data.description: A cautionary signal from Ethereum suggests a potential bull trap, similar to previous instances that led to drops of 45% and 48%. This increases the likelihood of a new downturn in the market.

data.title: Aave expands to OKX’s Ethereum L2 X Layer, its 21st integration. Aave hits $1 trillion lending volume milestone.
data.description: The X Layer on the OKX platform has become the 21st blockchain to incorporate Aave, a significant achievement for the leading decentralized finance protocol. Aave's cumulative lending volume has recently exceeded an impressive milestone, surpassing $1 trillion. This partnership underscores the growing popularity and success of Aave within the blockchain and DeFi space, as it continues to expand its reach and impact across various platforms and ecosystems.

data.title: Senate could host Fed chair nominee hearing week of April 13. Senator Warren opposes appointment.
data.description: The Senate Banking Committee is set to hold a hearing for the nominee for Federal Reserve Chair in mid-April. Senator Elizabeth Warren has raised objections to the suggested appointment.

data.title: Ethereum's No. 2 position at risk as stablecoins climb. Polymarket odds of losing spot surged from 17% to 59% in 2026.
data.description: According to Polymarket, the probability of Ether dropping from its current position as the second-largest cryptocurrency by market cap in 2026 has significantly risen from 17% to more than 59%. This shift in odds is attributed to the rapid growth of stablecoins which are posing a challenge to Ether's ranking in the crypto market.

data.title: White House app under fire for location tracking & privacy concerns. App collects personal data, including phone numbers.
data.description: According to information provided on the Google Play Store page, the application being referenced gathers personal information, including phone numbers, during use. Conversely, on the App Store, users are directed to review the privacy policy of the White House for further details.

data.title: 4DMedical receives CE Mark for CT:VQ™, enabling commercial launch across the European Union
data.description: Today, 4DMedical Limited (ASX:4DX) announced securing A$83 million in private placement funding to drive growth efforts, particularly for expansion in Europe. The company, based in Melbourne, Australia, is a top global player in the cardiothoracic field.

data.title: Sesame Oil Market Size to Reach USD 6,978.82 Mn by 2032 with the CAGR 4.76% with Rising Clean-Label Demand, Says Maximize Market Research
data.description: In Pune, India, as of March 30, 2026, reports suggest positive growth prospects for the global Sesame Oil market, with a valuation of USD 5,038.39 million in 2025. Projections indicate a significant upsurge, with the market expected to reach USD 6,978.82 million by 2032, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.76% from 2026 to 2032.

data.title: Enlight Research raises valuation and target share price for INVL Technology to EUR 5.05
data.description: Enlight Research, an independent investment research firm, has reevaluated the valuation of INVL Technology, a company specializing in investments in IT businesses. This evaluation comes in light of the release of preliminary results for the year 2025. INVL Technology is in the process of divesting its portfolio of investments. The updated valuation provided by Enlight Research is crucial for investors and stakeholders, as it reflects the company's performance and financial standing. The reevaluation is based on key financial metrics and industry trends. This information will help guide decision-making processes regarding INVL Technology's investments.
